name: GH_Component.GH_InputParamManager
summary: This class is used during Component construction to add input parameters.

methods.name: AddAngleParameter(String, String, String, GH_ParamAccess)
methods.signature: public int AddAngleParameter(string name, string nickname, string description, GH_ParamAccess access)
methods.summary: Add a floating point Number parameter to the input list of this component. The parameter will be aware that it is representing angles.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the parameter. Keep it short, single words are best.

params.name: nickname
params.doc: The nickname of the parameter. Keep it short, single characters are best.

params.name: description
params.doc: The description of the parameter. Be succinct but clear, single sentences are best.

params.name: access
params.doc: Parameter access type. You must provide a correct access code in order to use GetData(), GetDataList() or GetDataTree() respectively.

methods.name: AddAngleParameter(String, String, String, GH_ParamAccess, IEnumerable<Double>)
methods.signature: public int AddAngleParameter(string name, string nickname, string description, GH_ParamAccess access, IEnumerable<double> default)
methods.summary: Add a floating point Number parameter to the input list of this component. The parameter will be aware that it is representing angles.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the parameter. Keep it short, single words are best.

params.name: nickname
params.doc: The nickname of the parameter. Keep it short, single characters are best.

params.name: description
params.doc: The description of the parameter. Be succinct but clear, single sentences are best.

params.name: access
params.doc: Parameter access type. You must provide a correct access code in order to use GetData(), GetDataList() or GetDataTree() respectively.

params.name: default
params.doc: A collection of default values to store in the parameter Persistent Data.

params.name: description
params.doc: The description of the parameter. Be succinct but clear, single sentences are best.

params.name: access
params.doc: Parameter access type. You must provide a correct access code in order to use GetData(), GetDataList() or GetDataTree() respectively.

params.name: default
params.doc: A collection of default values to store in the parameter Persistent Data.

methods.name: HideParameter
methods.signature: public override void HideParameter(int index)
methods.summary: Hide a specific input parameter. If the parameter at the given index implements IGH_PreviewObject then the Hidden flag will be set to True. Otherwise, nothing will happen.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of parameter to hide.

properties.name: Param
properties.summary: Gets the input parameter at the given index.

properties.name: ParamCount
properties.summary: Returns the number of input parameters already part of this component.
